title: Device Home Screen - No Device connected - Supported List - User Guides
scenario: Supported Devices list displays all Poly devices and correct user guides when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently connected to the phone.
3. Observe the Home screen of the app.
4. Locate and tap on the 'Supported Devices' list option.
5. Verify that the list displays all supported Poly devices.
6. Tap on any device listed under the 'User Guides' section.
7. Observe the user guide that opens for that device.
expected: The Supported Devices list shows all supported Poly devices. Tapping on a device under User Guides opens the correct user guide for that specific device.
